phase1_capex_budget_eur.rationale: Megaproject CAPEX (multi-billion, multi-year, sovereign-scale). Plan states Phase 1 CAPEX as 5B-10B; Premortem flags stranded-capital risk and Expert Criticism flags uncosted holding-cost overruns. Triangular forced because Phase-8 lognormal sampler not yet implemented in run_monte_carlo (fat tails understated).

phase1_contingency_reserve_eur.rationale: Inferred 15% contingency on Phase 1 CAPEX; megaproject overrun-tail risk anchored on Review Issue 2's 1.3B+ holding-cost overrun warning. Triangular forced because Phase-8 lognormal sampler not yet implemented in run_monte_carlo (fat tails understated).

usd_hardware_capex_share.rationale: Plan assumes 30% USD hardware share of full 120B; medium uncertainty given evolving GPU/TPU sourcing mix and DGSI non-classified hardware restrictions for Phase 1 (Assumptions Q7).

fx_hedge_coverage_fraction.rationale: Plan commits to 70% forward hedging; Risk 4 notes residual exposure even with hedging. Spread reflects forward-market liquidity uncertainty for multi-year multi-billion hedges.

fx_shock_magnitude_fraction.rationale: Plan stress-tests a 10% EUR depreciation (Assumptions Q5, Risk 4); range covers benign FX year (0%) to deeper 20% depreciation captured by Premortem 8B-15B inflation citation.

land_holding_cost_eur_per_hectare_year.rationale: Review Issue 2 cites 50k-75k EUR/ha/year benchmark; spread widens for cadastral variance and remediation surcharges across Cambrai/Dunkirk industrial zones.

actual_phase2_takeorpay_commitment_fract.rationale: Base centered on plan commitment 0.6 (DEFAULT); no plan-internal passage anchors a base shift. Low-side spread reflects Risk 3 anchor-tenant withdrawal and Expert-Criticism 30-50% trigger as a softer downside floor.

actual_phase1_pue.rationale: Base at plan target 1.20 (DEFAULT); no plan-internal passage anchors a shift. High-side reflects Risk 2 (0.1 PUE drift to 1.25-1.35 on brownfield liquid-cooling scale-up); low capped by liquid-cooling 1.15 design target.

remediation_cost_overrun_eur.rationale: Risk 9 forecasts remediation overrun of 250-750M baseline doubling to 500M-2.25B; one-sided shortfall draw with base at mid doubling scenario, high near Risk-9 upper tail. Triangular forced because Phase-8 lognormal sampler not yet implemented in run_monte_carlo (fat tails understated).

correlations.rationale: Review Issue 2 and Risk 9 both forecast that brownfield remediation surprises co-drive Phase 1 CAPEX overruns; same hyper-dense brownfield assembly causes both.
